title: Bottle It!
description: Bottle ur Xp and Upgrade ur bottles to get even more xp
body:
Are You sick and tired to having Lots of xp but No xp bottles in fights?

Well You don't need to look any further! This fabric Mod Lets you bottle up ur experience!
You can even Craft Big experience bottles and gain more Xp then the normal boring experience bottles.

The recipe's are fairly easy to craft! These are the Recipe's!

## Crafting recipe's

### Empty bottle o' Experience.

![Empty Bottle's O' Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120d717bae4c307944ff8e9b5cdb70f5055240db.png)

### Big bottle o' Experience.

![Big Bottle's O' Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ab8feaf1a3b564ccc984a03413f09a1810d953.png)

### Experience Upgrader dupe.

![Experience Upgrade dupe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0deedcaee7b12f6780aed4e2227c3bc4cc03d47.png)

##

There are also some other ways to get Empty bottles or an Experience Upgrader!
You can get them by trading with an cleric.

### Cleric trades

![Cleric trade ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c31d59e8b46e217caa0159a169d7fdb636219c.png)


##

Another Thing This mod has is adveancements!

### You’ve bottled it!

![You've Bottled it!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/132c8bce3fb6a0f6a3a451783c22099cbcb8bc68.png)

### Not Quite there yet

![Not Quite There Yet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd1717d5cdcb4792c0c1dec53ff4273a576bb0e.png)

### Next-level bottling

![Next-level bottling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/482e1d4128a54260953c6f6ee71c03a33bfcebd8.png)

##

Find all these Items in the creative menu!
